mapper.select: SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM posts WHERE slug = #{slug} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seed_content_identity ( namespace, entity_type, seed_key, entity_id, pack_version, content_hash, metadata, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{namespace}, #{entityType}, #{seedKey}, #{entityId}, #{packVersion}, #{contentHash}, #{metadataJson}, NOW(3), NOW(3) ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE entity_id = IF( namespace = VALUES(namespace) AND entity_type = VALUES(entity_type) AND seed_key = VALUES(seed_key) AND entity_id = VALUES(entity_id), entity_id, NULL ), updated_at = NOW(3)
